description_long: This skateboard features a sleek, elongated deck with a black grippy surface bordered and accented by vivid magenta lines. The deck appears to be constructed from a durable composite or plastic material, with a slightly concave shape for stability and control. The underside is finished in a glossy magenta, with visible trucks and four robust black wheels attached. The wheels are wide and rounded, suggesting suitability for cruising or smooth rides on urban surfaces. The grip tape on top is solid black with two parallel magenta stripes running lengthwise, providing both traction and a striking visual contrast. No visible brand logos or deck graphics are present, giving the board a minimalist, modern aesthetic.
description: A long, magenta skateboard with a black grippy deck featuring parallel magenta stripes and wide black wheels. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible logos or deck graphics.
description_view_0: The skateboard is seen from an angled side view, highlighting the black grip tape with magenta stripes and the rounded black wheels.
description_view_1: A top-down view shows the full length of the black grip tape and the two magenta stripes running parallel along the deck.
description_view_2: This low side view emphasizes the magenta underside of the deck and the robust black wheels, with the trucks partially visible.
description_view_3: A rear angled view reveals the glossy magenta underside, the mounting of the trucks, and the wide stance of the black wheels.
attribute_wheel_type: cruiser, black, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: Standard trucks, magenta color, top-mount, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with two parallel magenta stripes running lengthwise, no graphics or text
